arts.ttl: Bristol Rovers confirm major departure ahead of Birmingham City clash
arts.sum: Former Birmingham City defender George Friend will leave his role as director of football of Blues' League One rivals Bristol Rovers at the end of the season and will be replaced by former Stoke City technical director Ricky Martin. Friend played 52 times under Karanka, Lee Bowyer and John Eustace before he left in 2023 and signed a one-year deal with Bristol Rovers, but in February 2024 he announced his immediate retirement from football and was unveiled as the Gas' director of football.

arts.ttl: Peterborough United confirm how many tickets they've sold for Birmingham City final
arts.sum: "The club are aware that Birmingham City supporters are targeting Posh supporters via social media offering financial incentive to purchase tickets for the Vertu Trophy Final on their behalf in our end of Wembley Stadium," Peterborough's statement read. Peterborough United have confirmed that they are on the verge of hitting 18,000 tickets sold for next month's Vertu Trophy final against Birmingham City at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: What Stansfield did at full-time as Birmingham City get their cheat code back
arts.sum: Ninety points has guaranteed promotion in all but one of the last 10 seasons in League One – Blues have 86 points with nine games to play. A nine-point lead over Wrexham, with two games in hand, means Blues only require 13 more points to guarantee the League One title – and that’s presuming Wrexham or Wycombe Wanderers win all of their remaining fixtures.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City have a clear formula which will make them the best EFL team in history
arts.sum: Birmingham City are on 86 points in League One this season - and they still have nine matches left remaining of their campaign Blues this term have averaged 2.32 points a game and continuing that across their remaining nine games would guarantee that they become the most successful EFL team ever.

Results went Bristol Rovers' way on Saturday despite their defeat against Mansfield, but their recent form suggests they are still in a real battle for survival. And with the likes of Bolton, Wrexham...
